mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, step_index, agent_role, step_name, status, input_summary, output_summary, retry_count, latency_ms, started_at, completed_at, created_at FROM agent_task_step WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY step_index ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, task_id, step_index, agent_role, step_name, status, input_summary, output_summary, retry_count, latency_ms, started_at, completed_at, created_at FROM agent_task_step WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_task_step ( task_id, step_index, agent_role, step_name, status, input_summary, output_summary, retry_count, latency_ms, started_at, completed_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{taskId}, #{stepIndex}, #{agentRole}, #{stepName}, #{status}, #{inputSummary}, #{outputSummary}, #{retryCount}, #{latencyMs}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_task_step SET input_summary = #{step.inputSummary}, output_summary = #{step.outputSummary}, status = #{step.status}, retry_count = #{step.retryCount}, latency_ms = #{step.latencyMs}, started_at = #{step.startedAt}, completed_at = #{step.completedAt} WHERE id = #{step.id}

UPDATE agent_task_step SET status = COALESCE(#{status}, status), output_summary = COALESCE(#{outputSummary}, output_summary), retry_count = COALESCE(#{retryCount}, retry_count), latency_ms = COALESCE(#{latencyMs}, latency_ms), completed_at = COALESCE(#{completedAt}, completed_at) WHERE id = #{id}
